query:
UPDATE users SET
            email         = COALESCE(?, email),
            username      = COALESCE(?, username),
            password_hash = COALESCE(?, password_hash),
            bio           = COALESCE(?, bio),
            image         = COALESCE(?, image),
            updated_at    = strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%fZ', 'now')
        WHERE id = ?
